item.title: Download WinBin2Iso 6.71
item.description: WinBin2Iso is a small program and simple application that allows you to convert the file .bin format .iso. WinBin2Iso support files larger than 2 gigabytes and does not require installation. The interface is quite simple WinBin2Iso only 1 window embodying the features of the software, you can choose the button WinBin2Iso to convert images bin to iso then choose select folder containing source files and output, all the settings are done in just a few seconds for you to implement features of...

item.title: Download Runtime NAS Data Recovery 4.05
item.description: Runtime NAS Data Recovery is a software tool designed to recover lost or deleted data from network attached storage (NAS) devices. A NAS device is a storage device that is connected to a network and provides access to multiple users. The software supports a wide variety of NAS devices and file systems, including well-known brands such as Synology, QNAP, Buffalo, NETGEAR, and more. It can recover many different types of data, including photos, videos, documents, and other file...

item.title: Download Runtime RAID Recovery for Windows 4.05
item.description: Runtime RAID Recovery for Windows is a software tool used to recover data from failed or damaged RAID arrays on Windows computers. RAID, or Redundant Array of Independent Disks, is a storage technology that uses multiple disks to improve performance and redundancy. RAID arrays can fail due to a variety of reasons, including hardware failure, power failure, software failure, and human error. When a RAID array fails, the data stored on it may become inaccessible, leading to data loss and...

item.title: Download Ventoy 1.1.11 + LiveCD
item.description: Ventoy is an open source tool for creating bootable USB drives for ISO files. With ventoy, you don't need to format the disk multiple times, you just need to copy the iso file to the USB drive and boot it. You can copy multiple iso files at once and ventoy will give you a boot menu to select them. Features of Ventoy 100% Open Source Simple to Use Fast (limited only by iso file copy speed) Boot directly from iso file, no extraction required Legacy + UEFI supported in the same...

item.title: Download Runtime Captain Nemo Pro 7.05
item.description: Runtime Captain Nemo Pro is a software tool used to access data from NTFS formatted drives without an internet connection. Runtime Captain Nemo Pro supports a wide variety of NTFS-formatted drives, including HDDs, SSDs, RAID arrays, and virtual disks. The software can recover many different types of data, including photos, videos, documents and other file formats. The software provides a user-friendly interface and supports advanced recovery features, such as disk imaging, disk editing,...

item.title: Download X-Ability Winmostar 11.15.3
item.description: Winmostar is an integrated GUI software designed for simulation programs such as GAMESS, MOPAC, LAMMPS, Gromacs and Quantum ESPRESSO. Winmostar serves as an integrated software solution, using programs (solvers) for MO, DFT and MD calculations as its backend. It provides pre- and post-processing capabilities, as well as file and process management functions. Software supported solvers include GAMESS, MOPAC, LAMMPS, Gromacs and Quantum ESPRESSO. Winmostar is designed to be installed and...

item.title: Download UWPSpy 1.5.3

When you select specific properties, the associated elements will be highlighted and any changes will update in real time. How to use: Run UWPSpy.exe and...

item.title: Download HFS: HTTP File Server (version 3) 3.0.9
item.description: HFS is a web file server to run on your computer. Share a folder or even a file thanks to the virtual file system. Essentially, this application turns your computer into an HTTP server and all users who want to connect and download files can do so by loading a simple website in their browser. HFS includes many configuration settings, so you can basically change each part of the application, starting with how users download files and ending with the appearance of the created website. item.title: Download Psiphon VPN: Freedom Online v458
item.description: Psiphon Pro is a VPN application for Android that allows users to access the Internet freely and securely. It uses a combination of VPN, SSH and HTTP proxy technologies to bypass censorship and firewalls, providing users with unrestricted internet access. It gives you unprecedented access to your favorite news broadcast or social media platforms. In essence, Psiphon Pro also protects you when accessing WiFi hotspots by creating a secure, private tunnel between you and the Internet....
